samples.xml_description:
```xml
<module id="pulse_detect">
    <description>Pulse Detection Module</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="1">One-bit input signal.</input>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="1">Output signal indicating the presence of pulses.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state name="IDLE" value="000000">Idle state.</state>
        <state name="PULSE_START" value="000001">Start of pulse detection.</state>
        <state name="PULSE_MID" value="000010">Middle of pulse detection.</state>
        <state name="PULSE_END" value="000011">End of pulse detection.</state>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <register id="state" width="4" init_value="000000">State register.</register>
        <wire id="next_state" width="4">Next state wire.</wire>
        <assign next_state = {state[3:0], data_in} />
        <always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)>
            if (!rst_n) begin
                state <= IDLE;
                data_out <= 1'b0;
            end else begin
                case(state)
                    IDLE: begin
                        if (data_in == 1'b1) begin
                            state <= PULSE_START;
                            data_out <= 1'b0;
                        end
                    end
                    PULSE_START: begin
                        if (data_in == 1'b0) begin
                            state <= PULSE_MID;
                            data_out <= 1'b0;
                        end
                    end
                    PULSE_MID: begin
                        if (data_in == 1'b1) begin
                            state <= PULSE_END;
                            data_out <= 1'b0;
                        end
                    end
                    PULSE_END: begin
                        if (data_in == 1'b0) begin
                            state <= IDLE;
                            data_out <= 1'b1;
                        end
                    end
                endcase
            end
        </always>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>Sequential logic for pulse detection and output generation.</implementation>
</module>
```
